pr.title: [track_10min_16mb] XSA7 + BigramHash + ValueResidual + Legal TTT — val_bpb=1.1227

output.summary: 11-layer parameter-banking GPT uses cross-sequence attention on the final 7 layers with bigram/trigram hash embeddings, value residual reinjection, and legal TTT with int6 quant.

legal score-first TTT after int6+lzma quantization
